name: Naomi Bar-Lev
background: BA in Economics from UCLA. Real estate broker for 20+ years. Former VP managing hundreds of loan officers and agents. Airbnb host/operator. Describes surviving espionage and vandalism against her property.
statement: The party system has definitively failed us. Media's incomplete reporting, unforgivable. My background includes a BA in Economics, UCLA, real estate broker for 20 plus years, construction experience, vice president, managing hundreds of loan officers and agents, to a robust Airbnb business. Improvements were made to my property to double the business's income, the very year vandalism and espionage against me began. Survival of continued attacks has enlightened me! I wrote a primer about the tyranny that has taken over, its explosive corruption, its use of police, the courts, technology, corporatism. Big tech partnerships now are violating civil and consumer rights as well as anti-trust law. At the center are fusion centers, hubs of information and military grade technology—6 centers statewide run by 'local police'. They have connected all devices, espionage made possible against the individual and business, which has transformed the courts. As governor, fusion centers will be for serious investigations of fraud, theft, and waste, a healthy revenue source with a leaner budget. Police will return to neighborhoods, fighting crime, taking reports equally among citizens, using a constitutionally compliant database. Phones and devices will be recalled, past services refunded. 'Partnerships' and non-disclosure agreements in government will be eliminated. A hiring spree to stock consumer and civil rights agencies. No sales, income, or property tax. Parking fees and permit fees will be eliminated.

positions.economy: No sales, income, or property tax; no parking or permit fees; leaner government budget
positions.publicSafety: Police return to neighborhoods; constitutionally compliant policing; equal treatment of citizens
positions.technology: Restrict fusion centers; end big tech government partnerships; recall surveilling devices; refund surveilled consumers
positions.corruption: Eliminate NDAs in government; stock consumer and civil rights agencies; end anti-trust violations
